question.content: Calculate the electric field strength 4 meters away from a charge of 0.01 Coulombs.

functions.name: calculate_electric_field_strength
functions.description: Calculate the electric field strength at a certain distance from a point charge.

distance.description: The distance from the charge in meters.

medium.description: The medium in which the charge and the point of calculation is located. Default is 'vacuum'.

question.content: Get me the directions from New York to Los Angeles avoiding highways and toll roads.

functions.name: map_service.get_directions
functions.description: Retrieve directions from a starting location to an ending location, including options for route preferences.

avoid.description: Route features to avoid. Default is an empty array.

functions.name: convert_currency
functions.description: Converts an amount from a particular currency to another currency.

base_currency.description: The base currency in which the original amount is present.

target_currency.description: The currency to which you want to convert.

amount.description: The amount you want to convert.

functions.name: ecology.get_turtle_population
functions.description: Get the population and species of turtles in a specific location.

year.description: The year of the data requested. (optional) Default is 2024.

species.description: Whether to include species information. Default is false. (optional)

question.content: Predict the price of the house in San Francisco with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and area of 1800 square feet.

functions.name: predict_house_price
functions.description: Predict the price of a house in a given area based on number of bedrooms, bathrooms and area.

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the house.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the house.

area.description: The area of the house in square feet.

location.description: The location of the house in the format of city name.

question.content: How many teaspoons are in 2 tablespoons for measurement in my recipe?

functions.name: recipe.unit_conversion
functions.description: Convert a value from one kitchen unit to another for cooking purposes.

from_unit.description: The unit to convert from. Supports 'teaspoon', 'tablespoon', 'cup', etc.

to_unit.description: The unit to convert to. Supports 'teaspoon', 'tablespoon', 'cup', etc.

precision.description: The precision to round the output to, in case of a non-integer result. Optional, default is 1.

question.content: Search for divorce law specialists in Los Angeles

functions.name: doctor.search
functions.description: Search for a doctor based on area of expertise and location

location.description: The city and state, e.g. Los Angeles, CA

functions.name: lawyer.search
functions.description: Search for a lawyer based on area of expertise and location

location.description: The city and state, e.g. Los Angeles, CA

expertise.description: Area of legal expertise. For example, 'Marriage', 'Criminal', 'Business'.

question.content: Mix yellow and blue colors and adjust the lightness level to 60 percent.

functions.name: mix_paint_color
functions.description: Combine two primary paint colors and adjust the resulting color's lightness level.

color1.description: The first primary color to be mixed.

color2.description: The second primary color to be mixed.

lightness.description: The desired lightness level of the resulting color in percentage. The default level is set to 50.

question.content: Get me the top 10 landmark cases in constitutional law in China.

functions.name: get_top_cases
functions.description: Retrieve a list of the most influential or landmark cases in a specific field of law.

field_of_law.description: The specific field of law e.g., constitutional law, criminal law, etc.

top_number.description: The number of top cases to retrieve.

country.description: The country where the law cases should be retrieved from. Default is United States of America.

question.content: Find the NASDAQ stock price for the company Amazon at closing March.11, 2022.

functions.name: get_stock_price
functions.description: Get the closing stock price for a specific company on a specified date.

date.description: Date of when to get the stock price. Format: yyyy-mm-dd.

exchange.description: Name of the stock exchange market where the company's stock is listed. Default is 'NASDAQ'

question.content: Show me the closest music shop where I can purchase a Yamaha acoustic guitar and a Kawai piano in San Francisco, California, and Chicago, Illinois.

functions.name: find_music_instrument_store
functions.description: Locate nearby music instrument stores that sell specific brands or instruments

location.description: The city and state e.g. San Francisco, CA.

instruments.description: A list of specific instruments or brands you are looking for.

model_raw_output:
<tool_call>
{"name": "find_music_instrument_store", "arguments": {"location": "San Francisco, CA", "instruments": ["Yamaha acoustic guitar", "Kawai piano"]}, "location": "Chicago, IL", "instruments": ["Yamaha acoustic guitar", "Kawai piano"]}}
</tool_call>

question.content: I need the details of the lawsuit case with case ID of 1234 and verify if it's already closed.

functions.name: get_protein_sequence
functions.description: Retrieve the protein sequence encoded by a human gene.

species.description: The species for which the gene is to be analyzed.

functions.name: route.estimate_time
functions.description: Estimate the travel time for a specific route with optional stops.

start_location.description: The starting point for the journey.

stops.description: Additional cities or points of interest to stop at during the journey. Default is an empty array.

functions.name: lawsuit.check_case
functions.description: Verify the details of a lawsuit case and check its status using case ID.

case_id.description: The identification number of the lawsuit case.

closed_status.description: The status of the lawsuit case to be verified.

question.content: What is the current time in Beijing and Tokyo and what's the time difference between two cities?

functions.name: time_zones.get_current_time
functions.description: Retrieve current time for the specified location

location.description: The city that you want to get the current time for.

functions.name: time_zones.get_time_difference
functions.description: Retrieve the time difference between two cities

city_1.description: First city for calculating the time difference.

city_2.description: Second city for calculating the time difference.

question.content: You are an investor who recently sold some stocks. You bought one stock at $150, another at $200, and another at $250. You sold them at $180, $210, and $300 respectively. You also received dividends of $20, $30, and $40 for each stock. Can you calculate the return on investment for each of these stocks using the 'calculate_return_on_investment' function?

functions.name: calculate_return_on_investment
functions.description: Calculate the return on investment for a given stock based on its purchase price, sale price, and any dividends received.

purchase_price.description: The price the stock was bought at.

sale_price.description: The price the stock was sold at.

dividend.description: Any dividends received from the stock.

question.content: "Could you please perform a statistical t-test to check if the means of two independent datasets are statistically different? The first dataset, Dataset A, includes the following integers: 12, 15, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 30, 32, 35. The second dataset, Dataset B, includes these integers: 14, 17, 19, 21, 23, 26, 29, 31, 33, 36. Please perform the test twice, once with a significance level of 0.05 and once with a significance level of 0.01."

functions.name: t_test
functions.description: Perform a statistical t-test to check if the means of two independent datasets are statistically different.

alpha.description: Significance level for the test. Default is 0.05.

question.content: Book a luxury room in Hotel Paradise, Las Vegas, with a city view for 3 days starting from May 12, 2022.

functions.name: random.normalvariate
functions.description: Generates a random number from a normal distribution given the mean and standard deviation.

sigma.description: Standard deviation of the normal distribution.

functions.name: get_personality_traits
functions.description: Retrieve the personality traits for a specific personality type, including their strengths and weaknesses.

traits.description: List of traits to be retrieved, default is ['strengths', 'weaknesses'].

functions.name: elephant_population_estimate
functions.description: Estimate future population of elephants given current population and growth rate.

growth_rate.description: The annual population growth rate of elephants.

years.description: The number of years to project the population.

functions.name: book_hotel
functions.description: Book a room in a specific hotel with particular preferences

start_date.description: The starting date of the stay in format MM-DD-YYYY.

stay_duration.description: The duration of the stay in days.

view.description: The preferred view from the room, can be ignored if no preference. If none provided, assumes no preference.

question.content: Can you generate a travel itinerary for a 7-day trip to Tokyo with a daily budget of $200 focusing on urban exploration, then do the same for a 10-day trip to Paris with a daily budget of $150 focusing on history, followed by a 5-day trip to Sydney with a daily budget of $100 focusing on nature, and finally a 12-day trip to Rome with a daily budget of $180 focusing on culture?

functions.name: travel_itinerary_generator
functions.description: Generate a travel itinerary based on specific destination, duration and daily budget, with preferred exploration type.

days.description: Number of days for the trip.

daily_budget.description: The maximum daily budget for the trip.

question.content: "Can you help me create a piece of music in D Minor with a tempo of 120 beats per minute and then generate an audio signal with a frequency of 440 Hz and an amplitude of 0.5? After that, I would like to generate another piece of music in E Major with a tempo of 90 beats per minute and a time signature of 3/4. Finally, generate another audio signal with a frequency of 300 Hz, an amplitude of 0.7, and a duration of 5 seconds."

functions.name: audio.generate
functions.description: Generate an audio signal given a frequency, amplitude, and duration.

frequency.description: Frequency of the audio signal in Hz.

duration.description: Duration of the audio signal in seconds. Default is 1 second if not specified.

functions.name: music.generate
functions.description: Generate a piece of music given a key, tempo, and time signature.

key.description: The key of the piece, e.g., C Major.

tempo.description: Tempo of the piece in beats per minute.

time_signature.description: Time signature of the piece, e.g., 4/4. Default is '4/4' if not specified.

question.content: Calculate the Body Mass Index (BMI) of a person with a weight of 85 kilograms and height of 180 cm.

functions.name: calculate_bmi
functions.description: Calculate the Body Mass Index (BMI) of a person.

weight.description: Weight of the person in kilograms.

height.description: Height of the person in centimeters.

unit.description: Optional parameter to choose between 'imperial' and 'metric' systems. Default is 'metric'.

functions.name: celebrity_net_worth.get
functions.description: Get the total net worth of a sports celebrity based on most recent data.

name.description: The full name of the sports celebrity.

currency.description: The currency in which the net worth will be returned. Default is 'USD'.

question.content: Find me a vegan recipe for brownies which prep time is under 30 minutes.

functions.name: find_recipe
functions.description: Find a recipe based on the dietary restrictions, recipe type, and time constraints.

dietary_restrictions.description: Dietary restrictions e.g. vegan, vegetarian, gluten free, dairy free.

recipe_type.description: Type of the recipe. E.g. dessert, main course, breakfast.

time.description: Time limit in minutes to prep the meal.

functions.name: science_history.get_discovery_details
functions.description: Retrieve the details of a scientific discovery based on the discovery name.

discovery.description: The name of the discovery, e.g. Gravity

method_used.description: The method used for the discovery, default value is 'default' which gives the most accepted method.

question.content: Generate a DNA sequence with 100 bases including more G (Guanine) and C (Cytosine).

functions.name: generate_DNA_sequence
functions.description: Generate a random DNA sequence with a specific length and nucleotide preference.

length.description: The length of the DNA sequence to be generated.

preferences.description: Preferred nucleotides to include more frequently in the DNA sequence.
